prompt: A high-fashion luxury editorial advertisement in a vertical format, featuring a mysterious female model from mid-torso up, centered and slightly turned to the side, wearing an oversized dark olive leather jacket with a high collar and prominent buckle strap detail near the neck. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while her dark wavy shoulder-length hair remains visible and voluminous. She carries a slouchy black leather shoulder bag with a gold chain strap and a small gold logo near the bottom corner. Place the large serif brand name LOEWE across the center in elegant white uppercase letters, overlaying the figure. Build the entire composition as a tactile collage made of torn and layered fabric and leather swatches: exactly 8 visible material fragments surrounding and partially overlapping the subject, including beige linen at the top left, olive stitched leather panels on the left, soft beige fabric at the lower left edge, dark brown embossed leather with a monogram motif at the upper right, rocky coastline photography at the right and lower right, a textured taupe stitched textile across the lower center, a dark denim-like fragment at the lower left, and a deep brown leather panel at the bottom right. In the background, reveal a dramatic coastal landscape with rocks, ocean waves, and a moody cloudy sky lit like late afternoon or sunset. Use rich earthy tones, muted olive, dark brown, taupe, black, and warm highlights. The overall look should feel premium, cinematic, moody, artisanal, and minimalist, like a luxury fashion campaign combining leather craftsmanship, collage art direction, and editorial photography.
